name: Covered Treatments for Ladder Fractures

mainEntity.name: What medical treatments are covered for ladder fall fractures in Holladay?
mainEntity.text: What medical treatments are covered for ladder fall fractures in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: All reasonable care: ER, surgery, PT, chiropractic up to MMI. Utah comp pays 100% no deductible; pre-authorization needed for non-emergency.

suggestedAnswer.text: Holladay claims cover ORIF for wrist/ankle fractures common in ladder falls. Dispute insurer delays with UR process. Choose your doctor after initial phase. Lifetime medical for chronic issues post-MMI.

description: All reasonable care: ER, surgery, PT, chiropractic up to MMI. Utah comp pays 100% no deductible; pre-authorization needed for non-emergency.
